reasoning: Without specific web search tools to assess the current on-the-ground reality in the DRC as of late October 2025, I must heavily weight the empirical base rate for 'any-increase ACLED questions', which is given as 0.225. Therefore, a randomly selected future 30-day period has a low probability of exceeding this historical mean. Following the instruction that uncertainty should increase with the forecast horizon, I have anchored my near-term estimate close to the base rate at 24% for the November 2 resolution date, and gradually regressed my estimates closer to 50% for the subsequent, more distant resolution dates (29% for November 25, and 35% for January 24).
